LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RUSSELL WONG, ALVIN WONG, VICTOR WONG, GEORGIANA WONG AND, A.W.W. ASSOCIATES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANTS' REPLY MEMORANDUM STRICKEN DUE TO EXCESSIVE LENGTH AND FAILURE TO OBTAIN LEAVE OF COURT. CRC 3.1113(D) AND 3.1113(E). SAN FRANCISCO ADMINISTRATIVE CODE SECTION 37.9C(E)(1) STATES THAT EACH TENANT RECEIVING A COVERED NO-FAULT EVICTION NOTICE SHALL RECEIVE HALF OF THE RELOCATION EXPENSES FROM THE LANDLORD AT THE TIME OF THE NOTICE, AND THE OTHER HALF WHEN THE UNIT IS VACATED. THE ORDINANCE CONTAINS NO EXCEPTIONS. THE OMI NOTICE THAT FAILURE TO VACATE THE PREMISES WITHIN 60 DAYS WILL RESULT IN LEGAL PROCEEDINGS, THAT PRORATA RENT IS DUE AND PAYABLE, AND THAT THE TENANTS ARE ENTITLED TO ONE HALF OF THE RELOCATION EXPENSES WHEN THE UNIT IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF'S 7-8-2008 LETTER DID NOT SUPERSEDE THE 60-DAY NOTICE. THE RENT ORDINANCE IS REMEDIAL LEGISLATION WHICH SHOULD BE LIBERALLY CONSTRUED TO EFFECT ITS PURPOSES. THE COURT ADDS: RULINGS NOT BINDING ON THE TRIAL COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Off Calendar

Minor Compromise Hearing (As To Minor Marlowe Heier)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., appeared with petitioner Amanda Heier, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Sabine Heier and Marlowe Heier, who were not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Sabine Heier:
Settlement Amount - $1,250.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00

As to Marlowe Heier:
Settlement Amount - $1,250.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00

The net balance of $!,250.00 for each minor shall be to be deposited into a blocked account. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Counsel for petitioner shall submit the proposed Orders Approving the Compromises, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, by 5:00 p.m. today, September 21, 2010.

Minor Compromise Hearing (As To Minor Sabine Heier)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS RUSSELL WONG, ALVIN WONG, VICTOR WONG, GEORGIANA WONG and, A.W.W. ASSOCIATES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq. Zanghi Torres Arshawsky LLP (415) 977-0444 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Maija O. Villegas, Esq. Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP (415) 278-9400, appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Defendants' reply memorandum stricken due to excessive length and failure to obtain leave of court. CRC 3.1113(d) and 3.1113(e). San Francisco Administrative Code section 37.9C(e)(1) states that each tenant receiving a covered no-fault eviction notice shall receive half of the relocation expenses from the landlord at the time of the notice, and the other half when the unit is vacated. The ordinance contains no exceptions. The OMI notice that failure to vacate the premises within 60 days will result in legal proceedings, that prorata rent is due and payable, and that the tenants are entitled to one half of the relocation expenses when the unit is vacated. Plaintiff's 7-8-2008 letter did not supersede the 60-day notice. The Rent Ordinance is remedial legislation which should be liberally construed to effect its purposes. The Court adds: rulings not binding on the Trial Court. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Off Calendar
